headline: DTE Energy Board of Directors declares quarterly dividend
summary: (NYSE: DTE) — The DTE Energy Board of Directors declared a $1.165 per share dividend on its common stock payable October 15, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business September 21, 2026.
